violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Certified food safety manager application given to person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer was observed to be discolored and changed with a new bottle. Chlorine sanitizer observed to be 50 ppm at the end of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
